tasks.subject: Task 0: Establish baseline
tasks.description: Run tests on current branch, record baseline count (~493)

acceptanceCriteria: All tests pass on current branch

tasks.subject: Task 1: Delete legacy pipeline files and fxPipeline gate
tasks.description: Delete statics.nix, resolve.nix, adapters.nix, fxPipeline.nix, 7 legacy tests. Make resolve=fxResolveTree. Fix: no duplicate resolve binding in exports.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Strip defaultFunctor from type system
tasks.description: Remove __functor from aspectSubmodule, simplify providerFnType.merge, update checkmate/aspect-functor.nix. Verify providerFnType.merge multi-module composition not broken.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Gut parametric.nix of legacy machinery
tasks.description: Remove withOwn, deepRecurse, deep, deepParametrics, applyDeep, applyIncludes. Rewrite fixedTo. CAUTION: parametric.expands semantic change — verify against tests.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Verify ctx-apply.nix compatibility
tasks.description: Verify buildIncludes works with rewritten fixedTo. forward.nix is UNCHANGED (fromAspect hook stays).

acceptanceCriteria: buildIncludes works with static fixedTo output

tasks.subject: Task 5: Remove aspect-chain from providers, templates, and tests
tasks.description: Remove aspect-chain and fromAspect=lib.head aspect-chain from 6 providers + home-env + 2 templates + 5 forward test files. Keep fromAspect where it uses proper context objects.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Clean fx pipeline (remove aspect-chain shim)
tasks.description: Remove aspect-chain from constantHandler and mkPipeline root override.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Rewrite has-aspect.nix to use fx pipeline
tasks.description: Replace resolve.withAdapter + adapters.collectPaths with fxFullResolve + state.pathSet. Includes root normalization inline.

acceptanceCriteria: collectPathSet uses fx pipeline with root normalization

tasks.subject: Task 8: Remove fxPipeline=false and rewrite legacy tests
tasks.description: Remove den.fxPipeline from all tests. Rewrite has-aspect tests, aspect-path.nix (use fx.identity.aspectPath), handle issue-369 (CRASHES with fx).

tasks.subject: Task 9: Run full test suite and fix failures
tasks.description: All tests pass. Fix cascade breakages.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Final cleanup and documentation
tasks.description: Remove stale comments, verify no dead code.

acceptanceCriteria: No stale comments about legacy pipeline
